properties.query:
let threshold = 4; 
let timeRange = 2h;
MicrosoftAzureBastionAuditLogs
| where OperationName == "Microsoft.Network/BastionHost/disconnect"
| where Message == "Login Failed"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeRange) // Filtra por los eventos ocurridos en los últimos 10 minutos
| summarize Message=make_set(Message),startTime=min(TimeGenerated),endTime=max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by UserName,UserEmail,TargetVMIPAddress 
| where EventCount>=threshold
properties.description: Detección de fuerza bruta de un usuario
